posts.author: WillowdaleHotel (Willowdale Hotel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I was really excited when I saw that the outlook email integration had been updated to allow attachments, but the 5mb total attachment limit is extremely limiting. Can this be expanded to match the accounts sending size limit (eg: my sending size limit is +/- 30mb)?

What are you trying to achieve

I have a board of all of my employees with their individual certifications uploaded in their own respective file upload column. I want to email someone when a new item is created with all of their certifications attached in one email for my HR team to print out and keep a soft and hard copy.
